{{Quote|Senator Jubben. STATUS: Terminated.|ASN-121's log|<ref name="Droid">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>}}
'''Jubben''' was an individual who worked as a [[Senator/Legends|senator]].<ref name="Droid" /> Prior to the [[Plot to assassinate Senator Amidala/Legends|plot]] to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] Senator [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> Jubben was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[ASN-121/Legends|ASN-121]], a custom [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] owned by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]].<ref name="Droid" /> Jubben was one of many senators murdered in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="Encyclopedia">{{CSWECite|II|176|Jubben, Senator}}</ref> After ASN-121 was shot by Wesell during the plot to kill Amidala, several fragments of the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] were uncovered<ref name="Droid" /> in one of the alleyways<ref name="Encyclopedia" /> of the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|undercity]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. When [[Slicer/Legends|sliced]], the droid's status logs revealed Wesell's involvement in Jubben's death, as well as in several previously unsolved assassinations.<ref name="Droid" />

==Behind the scenes==
Senator Jubben was first mentioned in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'', a [[2006]] reference book by [[Daniel Wallace]].<ref name="Droid" />
